name: ghost-agent-workflow
description: Codex skills for coordinated agent workflows, worker execution handoffs, and smart git commits.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate agent workflows, handoffs, and git commits.
interface.longDescription: Packages the thread-coordination, thread-goal-worker, and git-commit skills for workflows that coordinate persistent execution surfaces, assign scoped child goals, require worker self-review, and commit reviewed changes in the right submodule-to-root order.
defaultPrompt: Use $thread-goal-worker for this scoped child goal.
Use $git-commit to analyze current changes and commit them.
